title: nervilia lilacea
intro: Nervilia lilacea, also known as the Purple Nervilia, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia and Australia. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic compounds, exhibiting medicinal properties such as antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Nervilia lilacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The herbal preparation of Nervilia lilacea typically involves drying and processing the leaves or roots into teas, infusions, or supplements for medicinal use.
